name: kbridge-animate-pipeline-smoke
description: Phase-1 of the animate plan: prove the CPig Bind Body From File -> Sweep -> Animate Bound machinery on a CPig example that actually sweeps (leading-link-fork), before applying it to an Inventor mechanism (which needs the CPig solver fixed, B-cand-005). Binds the fork's 3 .stl bodies, sweeps the steer driver (30 steps), and previews the bound geometry posed at Step 15 via Animate Bound. Runs at doc=MM (CPig-native, unlike the cm kbridge overlay tests). Capture-only. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/fork-bind-sweep-animate.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A leading-link suspension fork shown as shaded solid CAD parts (lower link, upper link, carrier) posed mid-sweep, overlaid with a small CPig frame-triad skeleton. The solid parts should sit on the skeleton joints, forming one connected mechanism at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Fork bound geometry posed mid-sweep on the CPig skeleton.
